details.brokersummary:
Luxury Living in Ditmas Park ? No Broker Fee (Photos are of a similar unit with same finishes)
This beautiful elevator building is nestled on a picturesque, tree-lined street and ready for an August 1st move-in!
Apartment Features: Spacious bedrooms with ample closet space
- Generously sized living area - Abundant natural light throughout - Gleaming hardwood floors - Individual split units in each room for personalized climate control
Building Amenities: Resident lounge Fully furnished rooftop and outdoor spaces Bike storage On-site laundry room Co-working space with computer stations and complimentary Wi-Fi State-of-the-art fitness center
Prime Location: Just steps from the B/Q and 2/5 subway lines ? convenient access to everything Brooklyn and beyond has to offer!
No broker fee 8/1 move in Pets welcome

Welcome to 2718 Church Avenue, a beacon of luxury nestled at the intersection of PLG and Flatbush, Brooklyn. This one bedroom, one bathroom residence is thoughtfully designed to provide the ultimate in comfort and convenience. Expansive floor-to-ceiling windows flood the spacious interiors with natural light, and designer finishes create an atmosphere of understated elegance.
Situated just steps from the 2 & 5 train, 2718 Church Ave is just moments from all that Brooklyn has to offer. Our unique amenities offer a complete lifestyle package, designed to feel like a warm extension of each home. Additionally, the building?s proximity to Prospect Park offers endless recreational opportunities.
Amenities include: + Recreational Lounge + Generous Co-working space with Wifi + Furnished Rooftop Terrace + Fully Equipped Fitness Center + Package Room + Secure Bike Room + Yoga Room + Parking Available + Washer/Dryer in Each Residence

335 Fenimore: Luxurious Living Near Prospect Park Stunning 3-Bedroom Apartment with Private Terrace! No Broker Fee!
Apartment Features: Air Conditioning Hardwood Floors Stainless Steel Appliances Dishwasher Spacious Common Area Pet-Friendly Abundant Natural Light Track Lighting
Building Amenities: Gym Parking Laundry Room Roof Deck Media Room Bike Room
Prime Location: Just 2 blocks from the 2, 5, and Q trains Only 2 blocks from Prospect Park
Enjoy a perfect blend of luxury and convenience in this beautiful unit!

Myspace Exclusive! Beautiful pre-war 1.5 bedroom in Prime Williamsburg
Located at Roebling and South 3rd --- 4 minutes to the Marcy JMZ
1 sunny bedroom extra office room real living room with great layout ? fits a sofa, coffee table and TV separate kitchen tons of natural light in all rooms
Includes heat and hot water
NO BROKER FEE

Myspace Exclusive! Beautiful pre-war 2 bedroom in Prime Williamsburg
Located at Roebling and South 3rd --- 4 minutes to the Marcy JMZ
2 big sunny bedrooms real living room with great layout ? fits a sofa, coffee table and TV separate kitchen tons of natural light in all rooms
Includes heat and hot water
NO BROKER FEE

Fabulous 2 bedroom in a classic elevator prewar Williamsburg building!
Fully renovated with gorgeous hardwood floors and tons of natural light streaming in. 2 big bedrooms, lots of storage. HUGE living area with 2 big windows, with a separate kitchen area with stainless steel appliances. Elevator building with on-site super.
You?ll love living in this vibrant, lively neighborhood with all the necessities right outside your door and steps away from hotspots like Baby?s All Right, Bembe and Rabbit Hole. Commuting is quick and easy with a short walk to the Marcy JMZ. This beauty won?t last long, so call now!
August 1 move in Small pets OK

Beautiful studio / 1 bath apartment in Williamsburg, prime location! This apartment features a spacious living room, queen-sized bedroom, stainless steel kitchen, modern bathroom, hardwood floors, and windows that let in natural light throughout. You?ll be right around the corner from dozens of top-rated bars, restaurants, cafes, grocers, and music/art venues. Local favorites include Westlight, Brooklyn Bowl, Extra Fancy, Lucky Dog, Baby?s All Right, Patrizia?s, Battery Harris, Post Office, and Freehold. Short commute to Manhattan & easy access to the rest of Brooklyn?s hottest neighborhoods. Only blocks from the L train, and a short walk to the JMZ trains
Aug 1st move in Small pets welcome

Myspace Exclusive!
One bedroom with separate living room and kitchen in 1920s elevator prewar with live-in super.
- Queen sized bedroom - Big living room space - Tons of light, exposed brick, updated modern bathroom, kingsize bedrooms & plenty of space for entertaining.
Fabulous location just steps from Montrose L / Flushing JMZ trains and surrounded by tons of great bars, restaurants & shopping. Short commute to Manhattan!
Aug 1 move in Heat & hot water included Small pets welcome

Awesome corner unit 2 bedroom in prime Williamsburg!
- no broker fee
2 nice bedrooms Good size living area with lots of sunlight Separate kitchen area Heat and hot water included Live in super
Great location ? near JMZ trains and countless locals restaurants, bars, and coffee shops. The Rosemont, Williamsburg Pizza, Fiction Bar/Cafe, Domino Sugar Factory Park, Williamsburg Bridge, Pies-N-Thighs, Peter Luger, etc
Small pets welcome

Myspace Exclusive! Beautiful apartment in Williamsburg, prime location!
This 2 bedroom apartment features a spacious living room, queen-sized bedrooms, stainless steel kitchen, modern bathroom, hardwood floors, and windows that let in natural light throughout.
You?ll be right around the corner from dozens of top-rated bars, restaurants, cafes, grocers, and music/art venues. Local favorites include Westlight, Brooklyn Bowl, Extra Fancy, Lucky Dog, Baby?s All Right, Patrizia?s, Battery Harris, Post Office, and Freehold.
Short commute to Manhattan & easy access to the rest of Brooklyn?s hottest neighborhoods. Only # blocks from the L train, and a # minute walk to the JMZ trains
July 1 move in Small pets welcome No broker fee

Virtual Tour Available! Beautiful 1.5 BR/1bath apartment in fabulous Bushwick!This apartment is in the pindrop-quiet "rear" building of this unique courtyard complex! It's like your own little treehouse in the middle of Bushwick. You'll be right around the corner from dozens of top-rated bars, restaurants, cafes, grocers, and music/art venues. Local favorites include Mominette, Sea Wolf, Three Diamond Door, Precious Metal, The Rookery, Archie's, Heavy Woods, Idlewild, Clara's, Yours Sincerely, Chuko, Los Hermanos, Wheelhouse.No brokers fee!Only First & SecurityContact to schedule your appointment today!

Live in the heart of Williamsburg's vibrant neighborhood with this cool 2-bedroom, 1-bathroom apartment.
*Apartment Features:*
- 2 spacious bedrooms - 1 modern bathroom - Bright and airy interior - Perfect for creatives or professionals
*Neighborhood:*
- Iconic Williamsburg restaurants, bars, and shops nearby - Easy access to public transportation and Manhattan - Thriving arts and culture scene
Schedule a tour and make this Williamsburg hotspot yours!

Live in the heart of Williamsburg's vibrant neighborhood with this cool 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom apartment.
*Apartment Features:*
- 2 spacious bedrooms - 2 modern bathrooms - Bright and airy interior - Perfect for creatives or professionals
*Neighborhood:*
- Iconic Williamsburg restaurants, bars, and shops nearby - Easy access to public transportation and Manhattan - Thriving arts and culture scene
Schedule a tour and make this Williamsburg hotspot yours!

Live in the heart of Williamsburg's vibrant neighborhood with this cool 2-bedroom, 1-bathroom apartment.
*Apartment Features:*
- 2 spacious bedrooms - 1 modern bathroom - Bright and airy interior - Perfect for creatives or professionals
*Neighborhood:*
- Iconic Williamsburg restaurants, bars, and shops nearby - Easy access to public transportation and Manhattan - Thriving arts and culture scene
Schedule a tour and make this Williamsburg hotspot yours!

Live in the heart of Williamsburg's vibrant neighborhood with this cool 2-bedroom, 1-bathroom apartment.
*Apartment Features:*
- 2 spacious bedrooms - 1 modern bathroom - Bright and airy interior - Perfect for creatives or professionals
*Neighborhood:*
- Iconic Williamsburg restaurants, bars, and shops nearby - Easy access to public transportation and Manhattan - Thriving arts and culture scene
Schedule a tour and make this Williamsburg hotspot yours!

Step into a piece of Brooklyn history with this charming 2-bedroom, 1-bathroom apartment in coveted Clinton Hill.
*Apartment Features:*
- 2 spacious bedrooms with classic charm - 1 modern bathroom - Brownstone-style details and plenty of natural light - Perfect for couples or small families
*Neighborhood:*
- Historic brownstones, trendy restaurants, and boutique shops - Easy access to Prospect Park and public transportation - A true Brooklyn experience
Schedule a tour and make this Clinton Hill gem yours!

Discover this adorable 3-bedroom, 1-bathroom apartment, nestled in the heart of Bushwick.
*Apartment Features:*
- 3 cozy bedrooms - 1 modern bathroom - Bright and airy interior - Perfect for families, roommates, or creatives
*Neighborhood:*
- Bushwick's vibrant restaurants, bars, and shops nearby - Easy access to public transportation and Manhattan
Schedule a tour and make this Bushwick gem yours!

Experience the best of Flatbush in this sleek, brand-new building. Enjoy modern amenities and a prime location.
*Building Features:*
- Laundry facilities in building - Central air for comfort - Hardwood floors throughout - Dishwasher in every unit
*Neighborhood:*
- Trendy restaurants and shops nearby - Easy access to public transportation and Manhattan
Schedule a tour and make 2324 Bedford Ave your home!

Experience the best of Flatbush in this sleek, brand-new building. Enjoy modern amenities and a prime location.
*Building Features:*
- Laundry facilities in building - Central air for comfort - Hardwood floors throughout - Dishwasher in every unit
*Neighborhood:*
- Trendy restaurants and shops nearby - Easy access to public transportation and Manhattan
Schedule a tour and make 2324 Bedford Ave your home!

Experience the best of Flatbush in this sleek, brand-new building. Enjoy modern amenities and a prime location.
*Building Features:*
- Laundry facilities in building - Central air for comfort - Hardwood floors throughout - Dishwasher in every unit
*Neighborhood:*
- Trendy restaurants and shops nearby - Easy access to public transportation and Manhattan
Schedule a tour and make 2324 Bedford Ave your home!

Experience the best of Flatbush in this sleek, brand-new building. Enjoy modern amenities and a prime location.
*Building Features:*
- Laundry facilities in building - Central air for comfort - Hardwood floors throughout - Dishwasher in every unit
*Neighborhood:*
- Trendy restaurants and shops nearby - Easy access to public transportation and Manhattan
Schedule a tour and make 2324 Bedford Ave your home!

Spacious newly renovated 3-bedroom, 1.5-bath home at 776 Classon Ave in the heart of Crown Heights.
This pet-friendly apartment features oversized bedrooms, exposed brick details, and updated finishes throughout. Just minutes from Prospect Park, with easy access to the 2, 3, 4, 5, and Shuttle trains, making commuting simple.
Perfectly situated near some of Crown Heights? best restaurants, cafes, bars, and neighborhood favorites, this location offers the ideal balance of convenience, character, and city living.

The Baltic Canal ? Modern Living in Boerum Hill
Studios, 1- & 2-BR homes with oversized windows, white oak floors, custom kitchens, spa-style baths, and in-unit or on-site laundry. Select residences offer private balconies or terraces.
Amenities: Bike room, elevator, package room, gym, media room, and multiple outdoor spaces ? deck, garden, patio & panoramic roof deck.
Unbeatable location at the crossroads of Boerum Hill, Gowanus & Park Slope, near Whole Foods, top restaurants, boutique shops & F/G/R trains.
📅 Schedule your tour today and make The Baltic Canal your next home.

Bright and spacious two-bedroom with great flow and character! The home features tall ceilings, a skylight that fills the common area with sunlight, and a large living room perfect for entertaining or relaxing. Both bedrooms have their own windows and closets, and there?s an additional lofted space upstairs that can be used as an office, studio, or guest nook. All of this just around the corner from Maria Hernandez Park.

Virtual tours available!
Beautiful apartment in Williamsburg, prime location!
This apartment features a spacious living room, queen-sized bedroom(s), stainless steel kitchen, modern bathroom, hardwood floors, and windows that let in natural light throughout.
You'll be right around the corner from dozens of top-rated bars, restaurants, cafes, grocers, and music/art venues. Local favorites include Westlight, Brooklyn Bowl, Extra Fancy, Lucky Dog, Baby's All Right, Patrizia's, Battery Harris, Post Office, and Freehold.
Short commute to Manhattan & easy access to the rest of Brooklyn's hottest neighborhoods.

No Fee ? Luxury 1 Bed / 1 Bath in Brand New Elevator Building in Clinton Hill!
Modern design meets prime location in this spacious 1-bedroom, 1 bath apartment featuring hardwood floors, high ceilings, central A/C, and a private balcony. The open layout is perfect for entertaining, and each bedroom offers great light and flexibility.
Enjoy top-notch amenities including: ? Elevator ? Gym ? Lounge & Game Room ? Shared Workspace & Public Wifi ? Laundry Room & Bike Storage ? Furnished Rooftop with Skyline Views ? Courtyard & Outdoor Spaces ? Dishwasher, Eat-In Kitchen, Stainless Steel Appliances
Just 1 block from the Franklin Ave C/S trains?15 minutes to Manhattan. Close to Outpost, Doris, Sisters, and other local favorites.
First & Security Only | No Fee | Pets on Approval

Welcome to The Elliot, a contemporary residential building designed for comfortable modern living. The building features stylish common areas, quality finishes, and a strong amenity package for residents to enjoy.
BUILDING AMENITIES ? Sauna ? Yoga studio ? Film studio ? Modern lobby and common areas ? Elevator ? Package room ? Laundry room ? Bike storage
UNIT FEATURES ? Modern finishes ? Updated kitchen ? Stainless steel appliances ? Hardwood flooring ? Ample closet space ? Large windows ? Plenty of natural light

Virtual tours available!
Beautiful 2 bed / 1 bath apartment in Bushwick, prime location! This apartment features a spacious living room, queen-sized bedrooms, stainless steel kitchen, modern bathroom, hardwood floors, and windows that let in natural light throughout. You'll be right around the corner from dozens of top-rated bars, restaurants, cafes, grocers, and music/art venues. Local favorites include Mominette, Sea Wolf, Three Diamond Door, Precious Metal, The Rookery, Archie's, Heavy Woods, Idlewild, Clara's, Yours Sincerely, Chuko, Los Hermanos, Wheelhouse.
Short commute to Manhattan & easy access to the rest of Brooklyn's hottest neighborhoods. Only blocks from the L train, and a short walk to the J, M trains.

Bright and modern 1-bedroom in a beautifully restored historic mansion on Bushwick Ave, just one block from the J/Z trains at Gates Ave. This thoughtfully renovated home features a spacious living area with great natural light, a uniquely shaped bedroom with oversized windows and a full closet, and sleek modern finishes throughout.
Features include:
High ceilings and hardwood floors
Central air and dishwasher
Great sunlight throughout
Building perks:
Laundry on-site
Bike storage
Parking available
2BR/1BTH Amenities: ? Dishwasher ? Exposed brick ? High ceilings ? Renovated kitchen ? Half bath ? Great light ? Pet friendly

Beautiful apartment in Williamsburg, prime location!
This apartment features a spacious living room, queen-sized bedroom(s), stainless steel kitchen, modern bathroom, hardwood floors, and windows that let in natural light throughout.
You'll be right around the corner from dozens of top-rated bars, restaurants, cafes, grocers, and music/art venues. Local favorites include Westlight, Brooklyn Bowl, Extra Fancy, Lucky Dog, Baby's All Right, Patrizia's, Battery Harris, Post Office, and Freehold.
Short commute to Manhattan & easy access to the rest of Brooklyn's hottest neighborhoods.

Welcome to The Elliot, a contemporary residential building designed for comfortable modern living. The building features stylish common areas, quality finishes, and a strong amenity package for residents to enjoy.

UNIT FEATURES ? Modern finishes ? Updated kitchen ? Stainless steel appliances ? Hardwood flooring ? Ample closet space ? Large windows ? Plenty of natural light

Stunning 3 Bedroom in Prime Location
Just off the L/M trains at Myrtle-Wyckoff, this spacious 3-bedroom has everything you need ? and then some.
Enjoy stainless steel appliances, a dishwasher, wood floors, closets and windows in every room, plus central A/C. The building features top-tier amenities including a gym, laundry room, lounge, roof deck, courtyard, and bike storage.
Text or email today to schedule a tour

Studio in a modern elevator building with one of the biggest living rooms you?ll find?room for dining, lounging, and working. Bright and airy with oversized windows, a large kitchen, great storage, and in-unit washer/dryer. A/C in every room, big closets, sunny bedroom.
Building perks: gym, roof deck, pet spa, parking (for a fee), lounge, bike storage. No broker fee.

The Baltic Canal ? Modern Living in Boerum Hill
Studios, 1- & 2-BR homes with oversized windows, white oak floors, custom kitchens, spa-style baths, and in-unit or on-site laundry. Select residences offer private balconies or terraces.
Amenities: Bike room, elevator, package room, gym, media room, and multiple outdoor spaces ? deck, garden, patio & panoramic roof deck.
Unbeatable location at the crossroads of Boerum Hill, Gowanus & Park Slope, near Whole Foods, top restaurants, boutique shops & F/G/R trains.
📅 Schedule your tour today and make The Baltic Canal your next home.

Studio in a modern elevator building with one of the biggest living rooms you?ll find?room for dining, lounging, and working. Bright and airy with oversized windows, a large kitchen, great storage, and in-unit washer/dryer. A/C in every room, big closets, sunny bedroom.
Building perks: gym, roof deck, pet spa, parking (for a fee), lounge, bike storage. No broker fee.

3Bed / 2 Bath at 585 Knickerbocker Ave, Unit 2B ? Bushwick, Brooklyn All Pets Welcome | In-Unit Laundry | Near L & M Trains
Welcome to 585 Knickerbocker, a new residential gem in the heart of Bushwick. This bright and modern 3-bedroom features in-unit laundry, great natural light, and access to building amenities including a gym and a roof deck. Select units offer private outdoor space. Enjoy unbeatable proximity to Myrtle-Wyckoff (L/M) trains, plus Bushwick?s best cafes, shops, and nightlife.
Schedule your tour today!

SPACIOUS 2 BEDROOM - BACKYARD!!
GREAT LOCATION Near the L Jefferson Stop
Queen size Bedrooms on each side of the Apt Dishwasher S/S appliances, Wood flooring Windows/Closets

NO FEE ? Bright & Beautiful 2-Bedroom!
Spacious and sun-filled apartment in a prime Bushwick location, just a short walk to the J/Z trains at Gates Ave.
Apartment Highlights:
Stainless steel appliances + dishwasher
Queen-sized and full-sized bedrooms
Hardwood floors, large windows, and great closet space
Don?t miss out?email or text to schedule a viewing today. No broker fee!

No Fee ? Luxury 1 Bed / 1 Bath in Brand New Elevator Building in Clinton Hill!
Modern design meets prime location in this spacious 1-bedroom, 1 bath apartment featuring hardwood floors, high ceilings, central A/C, and a private balcony. The open layout is perfect for entertaining, and each bedroom offers great light and flexibility.
Enjoy top-notch amenities including: ? Elevator ? Gym ? Lounge & Game Room ? Shared Workspace & Public Wifi ? Laundry Room & Bike Storage ? Furnished Rooftop with Skyline Views ? Courtyard & Outdoor Spaces ? Dishwasher, Eat-In Kitchen, Stainless Steel Appliances
Just 1 block from the Franklin Ave C/S trains?15 minutes to Manhattan. Close to Outpost, Doris, Sisters, and other local favorites.
First & Security Only | No Fee | Pets on Approval
Updated 2-bedroom apartment with a private terrace. Features include central air, a dishwasher, and laundry in the building. Email to schedule a showing.

Bright 2-bedroom apartment in Bushwick near the Myrtle Ave J/M trains.
The apartment features a railroad-style layout with a spacious bedroom, an additional room that works well as an office or small guest room, and an updated kitchen with stainless steel appliances.
Features: ? Hardwood floors ? High ceilings ? Exposed brick ? Bonus room ? Great location near restaurants, cafes, shops, and nightlife
1 month free

Bright and modern 2-bedroom in a beautifully restored historic mansion on Bushwick Ave, just one block from the J/Z trains at Gates Ave. This thoughtfully renovated home features a spacious living area with great natural light, a uniquely shaped bedroom with oversized windows and a full closet, and sleek modern finishes throughout.
Features include:
High ceilings and hardwood floors
Central air and dishwasher
Great sunlight throughout
Building perks:
Laundry on-site
Bike storage
Parking available

Virtual tours available!
Beautiful 2 bed / 1 bath apartment in Bushwick, prime location! This apartment features a spacious living room, queen-sized bedrooms, stainless steel kitchen, modern bathroom, hardwood floors, and windows that let in natural light throughout. You'll be right around the corner from dozens of top-rated bars, restaurants, cafes, grocers, and music/art venues. Local favorites include Mominette, Sea Wolf, Three Diamond Door, Precious Metal, The Rookery, Archie's, Heavy Woods, Idlewild, Clara's, Yours Sincerely, Chuko, Los Hermanos, Wheelhouse.
Short commute to Manhattan & easy access to the rest of Brooklyn's hottest neighborhoods. Only blocks from the L train, and a short walk to the J, M trains.
